source.label: Targeted long-run public evidence
notes: Read-only public search/result snippets and accessible pages only.
No Instagram login actions, likes, saves, follows, comments, DMs, or CAPTCHA bypassing.
Used for targeted sanity checks where broad public ingestion missed a known company.

evidence.title: HeyClicky: Give your cursor infinite brains
evidence.text: DailyDropout reported HeyClicky racked up roughly 3M views the week it launched and crossed 6,300 GitHub stars.
evidence.rawVisibleText: Introducing HeyClicky: a tiny AI buddy that lives next to your cursor, sees what you see, and racked up ~3M views the week it launched. The Drop Down: Website: heyclicky.com; Traction: ~3M views on launch, 6.3K GitHub stars, #6 Product of the Day.
evidence.matchReason: Public web article used as context only. It does not score because raw platform metrics were not directly visible from the underlying social post.
